memoryArtifacts.description:
extrait des Sceaux de Gaucher III de Salins, de Maurette de Salins, de Guillaume IV de Mâcon et de Renaud de Vienne.
(J. Baptiste Guillaume — Histoire généalogique des sires de Salins au comté de Bourgogne)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurette de Salins於大約1132年出生在法國奧維坎塔爾薩林斯時，她的父親Gaucher III de Salins45歲，母親Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins41歲。她於1152年與Géraud Ier de Mâcon在法國瑟-吉馬內薩林斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1218年之後在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯奧南斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurette de Salins于大约1132年出生在法国奧維坎塔爾薩林斯时，她的父亲Gaucher III de Salins45岁，母亲Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins41岁。她于1152年与Géraud Ier de Mâcon在法国瑟-吉馬內薩林斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1218年之后在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯奧南斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latvian (Saliņš): topographic name for someone living on an island, derived from sala ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Maurette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English female personal name Lauret, a diminutive of the Latin personal name Laura, a short form of Laurencia (feminine form of Laurencius, see Lawrence ).

variants.name: Lorette
meanings: diminutive form of   Laura  , also sometimes used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Lorett
meanings: Variant of   Lauretta  , normally borne by Roman Catholics, among whom it is associated with   Loreto .

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Maurette de Salins was born about 1132, in Salins, Cantal, Auvergne, France, her father, Gaucher III de Salins, was 45 and her mother, Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins, was 41. She married Géraud Ier de Mâcon in 1152, in Salins, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1218, in Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurette de Salins est née environ 1132, à Salins, Cantal, Auvergne, France, son père, Gaucher III de Salins, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Géraud Ier de Mâcon en 1152, à Salins, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1218, à Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurette de Salins um 1132 in Salins, Cantal, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gaucher III de Salins 45 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins 41. Sie hat 1152 in Salins, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Géraud Ier de Mâcon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1218 in Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurette de Salins è nata il circa 1132 nel Salins, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Gaucher III de Salins, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Géraud Ier de Mâcon nel 1152, nel Salins, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1218, nel Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurette de Salinsが約1132年にフランスアウバーグンカンタルサリンスで生まれた時，父Gaucher III de Salinsは45歳，母Beatrix Gaucher III de Salinsは41歳であった。1152年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンサリンスでGéraud Ier de Mâconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1218年以後にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズオルナンスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurette de Salins(이)가 대략 1132년 프랑스 오버그니 캔탤 살린스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gaucher III de Salins(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1152년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 살린스에서 Géraud Ier de Mâcon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 이후 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 른아스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurette de Salins nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Salins, Cantal, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Gaucher III de Salins, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Géraud Ier de Mâcon em 1152, em Salins, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1218, em Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurette de Salins родилась около 1132 г. в местности салинс, канталь, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Gaucher III de Salins было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Géraud Ier de Mâcon в 1152 г. в местности салинс, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1218 г. в местности орнанс, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

sm.um 1132–nach 1218: e tusa o le 1132–ina ua ma'ea le 1218

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurette de Salins nació aproximadamente 1132, en Salins, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Gaucher III de Salins, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Beatrix Gaucher III de Salins, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Géraud Ier de Mâcon en 1152, en Salins, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1218, en Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia.
